description: Cross-runtime agent identity contract. Provides portable, verifiable agent identity that persists across runtime providers, sessions, and deployments. Enables agent authentication in A2A communication, provenance attribution, and governance audit trails.

resolve.description: Resolve an agent's identity by ID, returning its manifest, capabilities, governance policy, and trust metadata.

verify.description: Verify that an agent's claimed identity matches its registered manifest and governance policy. Used in A2A handshakes and cross-runtime invocations.

register.description: Register or update an agent's identity in the registry. Links the agent to its ampersand.json declaration, SpecPrompt spec, and Delegatic org.

identity_schema.manifest_hash: string (SHA-256 of ampersand.json at registration time)
identity_schema.spec_hash: string | null (SHA-256 of linked SpecPrompt SPEC.md)
